Fixed container health checks: use 127.0.0.1 instead of localhost, increased timeout to 10s. Containers can't resolve localhost due to DNS issues.

Phase 7 complete: Tag index management (SADD/SMEMBERS/SREM), reverse lookup (_keytags:), InvalidateByVersion with tag cleanup. SAdd uses DoMulti for atomicity. 7 test cases added. QA PASSED after fixing tag cleanup in InvalidateByVersion.
